name: Tom Clancy's H.A.W.X
aliases: Tom Clancys H A W X

install_dir_names: Tom Clancys H A W X

post_apply_message:
Tom Clancy's H.A.W.X (2009, non-Steam) — Apply auto-adds the Steam shortcut and skips the intro logos. Stage GE first with 'gfm stage-runner'.

THE KEY BIT — THE RIGHT EXE: the game ships TWO near-identical 10.5MB executables. HAWX.exe runs D3D9; HAWX_dx10.exe runs D3D10 and BLACK-SCREENS on launch for lots of people (worse under Proton). The shortcut points at HAWX.exe deliberately. If you ever re-add it by hand, do not grab the dx10 one.

Also applied: the 7 intro/logo videos are renamed to .gfm-orig (~162MB of them — teaser_logo.bik alone is 142MB). Mission briefings (brf_*.bik) and the menu background (bg_movie.bik) are left alone. Revert puts them all back.

NOTHING ELSE IS NEEDED: controller is native full XInput (the game ships xinput1_3.dll) so Steam Input just works — no x360ce, no mod. Widescreen is native up to 4K, so set 1920x1200 in the in-game video options. Your copy is already v1.02, the latest patch. Saves + config live in the prefix (Saved Games/Tom Clancy's H.A.W.X/Profiles), so a prefix backup covers them — no save_paths needed.

IF IT MISBEHAVES:
· Black screen on launch → it's starting at a bad resolution. Edit _settings_0.1.525.ini in the prefix's Saved Games/Tom Clancy's H.A.W.X/Profiles and set windowd = true under [Video].
· Freezes for ~20s every minute → the game is phoning home to Ubisoft's servers, dead since Oct 2015. Play offline / block its network. Tell me if it happens and we'll add a block.
notes:
Built 2026-07-13 straight off Tony's Windows install at F:\games\Tom Clancys H A W X (21,519 files / 6.8GB) — no SD scan needed, which is why this shipped ahead of the SD copy. Retail H.A.W.X has NO third-party DRM (CD-key was for online only), so the copy just runs; that is the whole reason HAWX 1 is viable while HAWX 2 is DROPPED (HAWX 2 is stuck behind Uplay — its scan shows orbit/uplay.exe + ubisoftgamelauncher.exe, the same dead-launcher trap as Driver SF).

Verified against the real install: BOTH HAWX.exe (10.5MB, D3D9) and HAWX_dx10.exe (10.5MB, D3D10) exist at the root; only nested exes are DetectionTool/detectionui_r.exe + Uninstall/unins000.exe (no repack SP launcher). ReadMe [EN].txt confirms v1.02. xinput1_3.dll present at root. All 7 PCGW-listed intro biks confirmed present in Data/Movies with the exact casing used above.

PCGW (Tom_Clancy's_H.A.W.X): DX10 features need the separate exe; Steam users report the DX10 exe black-screening; widescreen + 4K native; full controller support incl. XInput/remapping/sensitivity; config+saves at %USERPROFILE%/Saved Games/Tom Clancy's H.A.W.X/Profiles (_settings_0.1.525.ini, [Video] windowd=true fixes the bad-resolution black screen); freezing every ~minute = dead Ubisoft online services (delisted 2015, services off Oct 2015); patch 1.02 is the last. Steam appid was 21900 (delisted 2015) but Tony's is a non-Steam DODI repack -> computed appid, not in the gospel registry.

DEPLOY NOTE: at 21,519 files this is the one game where a folder copy over SMB would crawl (a round-trip per file) — unlike BF3's 368 files. If it ever gets staged for `gfm deploy`, stage it as an ARCHIVE, not a folder.
